scripts.test:vector-state: tsc --noEmit false --outDir dist-test --target ES2020 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext src/components/vector/vectorPanelState.ts && node --test test/vectorPanelState.force-rerun.test.mjs
scripts.test:kg-progress: tsc --noEmit false --outDir dist-test --target ES2020 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext src/components/kg/progressUtils.ts && node --test test/kgProgress.test.mjs
